title: Claude Code PreToolUse Hook Input
description: Stdin JSON payload delivered to PreToolUse hooks by Claude Code. Based on official Claude Code hooks documentation.

transcript_path.description: Path to the session transcript file. Always present in Claude Code (never null).

cwd.description: Working directory of the Claude Code agent.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool being invoked (e.g. 'Bash', 'Write', 'Edit').

tool_input.description: The tool's input arguments as a JSON object.
